title: Red River Region (Manitoba) - Canada.ca

## Red River Region Manitoba

## Red River Region Manitoba
The Red River Region, which is located in Southern Manitoba, is a haven of natural and cultural riches steeped in vibrant Francophone tradition. It encompasses the rural municipalities of Ritchot, De Salaberry, Montcalm and St-Pierre-Jolys village. With the Red River running through it, this territory offers a peaceful setting, where history, agricultural traditions and community life blend harmoniously. The region is known for its warm welcome, rich cultural life and many events celebrating the French language and Métis heritage.
Where is the Red River Region?
